objective: Execute the repo_hygiene_and_correctness plan to clean up repository artifacts and fix timestamp/caching bugs.
design_decisions: Created an orphan branch `docs-archive` to preserve 196 historical session logs without bloating the working tree.
Replaced naive `datetime.now()` with timezone-aware `datetime.now(timezone.utc)` for history entries.
Implemented a tolerant timestamp parser in `history.py` to properly sort legacy naive timestamps alongside new aware timestamps without crashing.
Added `invalidate()` to `LudusaviGateway` to clear `_adapter` and other properties on forced refresh, ensuring adapter-level caches are naturally dropped.
Used `os.getuid()` in `_ludusavi_env` to dynamically assign `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR` instead of hardcoding '1000', for non-stock user support.
Updated `test_service.py` mock adapter factory to support both direct adapter testing and forced refresh invalidation via `adapter_factory=lambda: adapter`.
Enforced a coverage floor of 83% in `pyproject.toml` via `pytest-cov` to ensure no coverage regressions.
results: Orphan script removed, agent logs archived, working tree clean.
History module handles mixed era/format timestamps correctly.
Forced refresh correctly invalidates gateway cache.
Overall repo hygiene and robustness improved.
